title: astragalus aestivorum
intro: Astragalus aestivorum, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species within the pea family (Fabaceae). It is traditionally used in various forms of medicine, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its adaptogenic properties, which allow the body to resist stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus aestivorum include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it beneficial for the health benefits of reducing fatigue, improving sleep quality, and enhancing the immune system. Astragalus aestivorum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, for convenient consumption.
